description: Canonical FDS section ordering for document assembly. Consumed by /doc:complete-fds workflow to reorder phase content into correct IEC-style hierarchical structure regardless of ROADMAP phase order.

equipment_modules.description: One subsection per equipment module discovered in ROADMAP phases. Subsection numbering follows 4.x pattern where x is sequential.

baseline_section.note: When baseline section is inserted, standard section 1.4 (Abbreviations) shifts to 1.5

mapping_conventions.description: How the assembly workflow maps ROADMAP phase content to FDS sections

static_sections.system-overview: Maps to section 1 (Introduction) and section 2 (System Overview) from ROADMAP phase with goal containing 'system overview' or 'introduction'
static_sections.functional-requirements: Maps to section 3 (Functional Requirements) from ROADMAP phase with goal containing 'operating modes', 'state machine', or 'sequence'
static_sections.interfaces: Maps to section 5 (Interfaces) from ROADMAP phase with goal containing 'interface', 'communication', or 'integration'
static_sections.safety: Maps to section 6 (Safety) from ROADMAP phase with goal containing 'safety', 'emergency', or 'interlock'
static_sections.baseline: Maps to section 1.4 (Baseline System) from BASELINE.md file in project root (Type C/D only)
static_sections.appendices: Maps to section 7 (Appendices) from various sources: complete I/O list auto-generated from all equipment modules, signal descriptions from dedicated appendix phase

dynamic_sections.equipment_modules: Maps to section 4.x subsections from ROADMAP phases where phase name matches equipment module naming convention (e.g., 'EM-XX: Equipment Name'). Each equipment module phase CONTENT.md provides content for subsections 4.x.1 through 4.x.9 based on subsection markers in the content file.

auto_generated.abbreviations: Section 1.4 (or 1.5 if baseline exists) auto-generated from scanning all document content for uppercase 2+ letter sequences, matched against industrial abbreviations dictionary, plus manual additions from abbreviations.md frontmatter template
auto_generated.complete_io_list: Section 7.1 auto-generated by aggregating all I/O List subsections (4.x.5) from equipment modules into a single consolidated table

assembly_workflow_instructions.step_1: Parse this fds-structure.json to determine canonical section ordering and hierarchy
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_2: Determine project type (A/B/C/D) from PROJECT.md metadata
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_3: If Type C or D, insert baseline section per type_conditional rules (shifts abbreviations from 1.4 to 1.5)
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_4: Scan ROADMAP.md to discover all equipment module phases (match naming pattern)
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_5: For each equipment module, create section 4.x with 9 subsections per dynamic_sections.equipment_modules template
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_6: Map ROADMAP phase content to static sections using mapping_conventions
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_7: For any required section without content, insert placeholder_stub text
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_8: Auto-generate abbreviations list (1.4 or 1.5) and complete I/O list (7.1)
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_9: Number all sections according to hierarchy (handle baseline insertion offset)
assembly_workflow_instructions.step_10: Assemble final document with: frontmatter (title page, revision history, ToC, abbreviations) + body (sections 1-7) + appendices
